title: The Vanishing Curator
description: Late at night, the city museum received a distress call. A priceless golden artifact — the Eye of Horus — has vanished from the east wing. The security footage shows a figure in an ALARM-disabling uniform entering through the VAULT room at exactly midnight. A GUARD log confirms the unauthorized entry. Witnesses report seeing a red LASER tripwire being cut near the exhibit. The suspect managed to ESCAPE through the back corridor. Your team has been called in to decode the hidden message left behind and catch the culprit before they leave the city. Study this passage carefully — the answers to every question are hidden within it.

levels.title: Find the Hidden Words
levels.instruction: Find all 5 words in order. First letters spell the code.

levels.title: Wire Match
levels.instruction: Connect each color on the left to its match on the right.

levels.title: Interrogation Room
levels.instruction: Answer all 5 questions correctly to get the code.

levels.title: Memory Grid
levels.instruction: Memorize the highlighted blocks then tap them in order.

levels.title: Crack the Lock
levels.instruction: Enter the level numbers where you found each code in order.

clues.text: The curator's badge was found near the VAULT room.
Security footage shows someone in an ALARM-disabling uniform.
A GUARD log shows an unauthorized entry at midnight.

questions.question: Where was the Eye of Horus stolen from?
What system did the suspect disable to enter?
What time did the unauthorized entry happen?
What was the code you found in Level 1?
Which color was NOT present in Level 2?

story_reveal: The curator staged the theft for insurance money. The passphrase VAGLE was his initials — Victor A. Greene, Larceny Expert. Case closed.

title: The Midnight Cipher
description: A secret society known only as SHADOW has been operating in the city library for months. They meet every night at MIDNIGHT in the old clock tower behind the reading room. Their symbol is a RAVEN holding a KEY — carved into the back of bookshelf seven. An anonymous tip revealed their exit CODE is hidden inside a copy of a mystery novel. The librarian found a note written in CIPHER left between the pages. Your team must decode their message before sunrise and expose the society. Every answer you need is hidden somewhere in this passage — read it carefully before proceeding.

levels.title: Find the Hidden Words
levels.instruction: Find all 6 words in order. First letters spell the code.

levels.title: Wire Match
levels.instruction: Connect each color on the left to its match on the right.

levels.instruction: Answer all 5 questions correctly to get the code.

levels.instruction: Memorize the highlighted blocks then tap them in order.

clues.text: The manifesto mentions a SHADOW organization.
They meet at MIDNIGHT in the old clock tower.
Their symbol is a RAVEN holding a KEY.
The exit CODE is hidden in plain sight.

questions.question: What is the name of the secret society?
Where does the society meet every night?
What was the code you found in Level 1?
Which color was NOT present in Level 2?

story_reveal: The society was a book club that enjoyed mystery novels. The SMRKCC passphrase stood for their meeting room: Sub-basement Meeting Room, Knitting Circle Corner. Mystery solved.
